data.title: SEC Charges 'Magic Mushroom' Co. Minerco In $8M Pump-And-Dump Scheme
data.description: SEC charges Minerco in an $8M pump-and-dump scheme. Shumake and Jenge face fraud charges for falsely promoting Minerco as a psilocybin co.

data.title: This Nike Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Upgrades For Thursday
Deere, Amgen, Copart And More: CNBC's 'Final Trades'
data.description: On CNBC's "Halftime Report Final Trades," Jim Lebenthal of Cerity Partners named Deere & Company as his final trade.

data.title: September Inflation Hotter Than Expected, Jobless Claims Spike The Most In Over A Year, Clouding Fed's Interest Rate Outlook
data.description: US inflation rate declines for 6th month, while jobless claims increase. Fed may cut interest rate in Nov. Core inflation unexpectedly rises.

data.title: Jim Cramer Likes Reddit Very Much, Calls Accenture A 'Great Buy'
data.description: On CNBC's "Mad Money Lightning Round," Jim Cramer recommended buying Reddit, which went public earlier this year.
